summary: The South Bay's funding machine hit overdrive in March and early April, with $4B+ in deals closing across AI, semiconductors, and robotics. Heavy hitters like Ayar Labs ($500M Series E), Nexthop AI ($500M Series B), and SiFive ($400M Series G) anchored a crowded field, while smaller rounds showed appetite for robotics and healthcare tech. Hiring remains mostly steady across local startups, though most major action is concentrated in Palo Alto, San Jose, and Santa Clara.
